summary: Visual QA test for color consistency overhaul of LEXA Lifestyle website. All dark mode backgrounds verified to be neutral charcoal (#050505, #0A0A0A, #0F0F0F, #171717) with NO blue tints. CSS variables changed from blue HSL(222) to neutral HSL(0) confirmed working. Gold accents (#C9A962) visible. All 11 test scenarios PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Color refactor complete. All dark mode backgrounds are neutral charcoal (R=G=B), no blue tints. Footer has 6 social icons. Admin dashboard works. Mobile view has no horizontal overflow.

verified_features.notes: Dark charcoal background rgb(5,5,5), gold accent buttons visible, hero section renders correctly
Clean dark charcoal background rgb(5,5,5), no blue tints, solution cards render properly
Consistent charcoal theme rgb(5,5,5) - rgb(15,15,15), service cards styled correctly
Charcoal theme rgb(5,5,5), category filters visible, article cards with correct dark backgrounds
Dark charcoal background, Quick Tools bar transparent, tier cards (Basic, Advanced, Gold, Platinum) visible with proper dark styling
Charcoal theme, Google Maps iframe visible, contact form styling consistent
Pure black background rgb(0,0,0), 6 social icons present: Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X (Twitter). Gold accents on hover.
Transparent at top, rgba(10,10,10,0.73) with backdrop blur when scrolled. No blue tint.
Navigated through Homepage, Solutions, Blog, Packages - all show neutral charcoal backgrounds (R=G=B within tolerance). NO blue-shifted colors detected.
Homepage and Blog page tested at 375px mobile viewport. No horizontal overflow, proper spacing, hamburger menu visible, touch targets adequate.
Login works with admin/lexa2026, dashboard renders with consistent dark theme rgb(5,5,5). Shows 106 Solutions, 19 Projects, 53 Articles, 37 Brands.

color_analysis.result: ALL backgrounds are neutral (R ≈ G ≈ B within 10)
